_note: VAST 3.0 InLine declaring apiFramework="VPAID". VPAID was deprecated in VAST 4.1 and REMOVED in 4.2 — most modern SSPs flag it as legacy/risk. Validator should emit: vast.vpaid_deprecated WARN. Plus version is 3.0 (still supported), so no version_unknown. Plus a Linear without Duration → vast.linear_duration_missing ERROR. Useful to demo two of the new rules.
